reviews.comment:
Excelente
Nos atendió Abel y otro muchacho, ambos súper amables y atentos.
El café y las medialunas exquisitos.
Los baños súper limpios, se nota el cuidado de las instalaciones.
Super recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! We were served by Abel and another young man, both incredibly friendly and attentive.
The coffee and croissants were delicious.
The restrooms were spotless; you can tell they take good care of the facilities. Highly recommended!
